caption: A woman with blonde highlights in her hair wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while sitting in a podcast studio. She has a concerned or contemplative facial expression, with her hand resting near her collarbone. In front of her is a professional microphone on a stand. The background consists of a white wall and a black acoustic panel framed in yellow. To her left, a screen displays the word "ohnson" in red. Several logos and text overlays appear on the screen, including a graphic that says "BOSS TALK 101" and a smaller logo reading "PODCAST". A small sign above the black panel reads "Employees Only". Across the frames, the woman remains in the same position, with subtle shifts in her facial expression and head tilt, while the camera and surroundings remain static.
